message:
fix(bench): Box::pin large futures in mux_pool_scaling Cx-aware benchmarks

The health_check_with_cx (19KB) and connect_with_cx (18KB) futures
exceed clippy's large_futures threshold. Wrap with Box::pin to heap-
allocate, matching the pattern used for the non-Cx variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
